calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor and an Adult.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Kyung Hee Becker was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Hae Sung Park, and on behalf of herself.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kyunghee Caroline Kim Becker.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Haesung William Edward Becker.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
